title: CRIMINAL HISTORY RECORD CHECKS - 211info
text: OREGON STATE POLICE HEADQUARTERS CRIMINAL HISTORY RECORD CHECKS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides public access to Oregon criminal history record information. Individuals may request copies of their personal records from the state of Oregon or the FBI or copies of another individual's Oregon record (also known as an open record). Fingerprinting services are offered at the Salem office only. 3565 Trelstad Avenue SE Salem, OR 97317 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (503) 378-3070 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 378-3070 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website FEES: Open record: $33 Copy of personal record: $33 Public fingerprinting services: $30 DOCUMENTS: Personal record: Completed form, fingerprints Open record: Completed form AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: Criminal History Records Other Services Offered At This Location: LAW ENFORCEMENT SERVICES - OREGON STATE POLICE LAW ENFORCEMENT SERVICES - SEX OFFENDER REGISTRATION UNIT If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. OREGON STATE POLICE HEADQUARTERS
